description:
You are an 8th-grade Earth Science teacher at an OLPC-equipped school preparing a lesson on planetary geology. You have downloaded the official NASA Meteorite Landings dataset.

Your task is to identify the heaviest meteorites and create a formatted reading handout for your students.

1. Open the Terminal activity and inspect the dataset located at `/home/ga/Documents/meteorite_landings.csv`.
2. Find the 3 meteorites with the largest `mass (g)` in the dataset.
3. Convert their mass values from grams (g) to kilograms (kg).
4. Open the Write activity from the Sugar desktop.
5. Create a document containing the names of these top 3 heaviest meteorites and their correctly converted mass in kilograms.
6. Save the document to the filesystem at `/home/ga/Documents/heaviest_meteorites.odt` (use File > Save As and select ODT format).

Ensure you explicitly write 'kg' or 'kilograms' in the document so students understand the units.
